title: Heat exchanger
abstract: An embodiment of the invention herein provides a heat exchanger. The heat exchanger includes a pair of spaced apart manifolds, and a plurality of heat exchange elements extended between the pair of spaced apart manifolds. Further, at least one manifold of the pair of spaced apart manifolds includes a first part and a second part integrally formed with the first part at an angle. Further, the first part and the second part are having same profile and same cross-section.
claims: Claims 1 . A heat exchanger (100), comprising: a pair of spaced apart manifolds (102A, 102B); and a plurality of heat exchange elements (104) extended between the pair of spaced apart manifolds (102A, 102B), wherein at least one manifold of the pair of spaced apart manifolds (102A, 102B) comprises a first part (202) and a second part (204) integrally formed with the first part (202) at an angle, wherein the first part (202) and the second part (204) are having same profile and same cross-section. 2. The heat exchanger (100) as claimed in claim 1 , wherein the first part (202) is connected to the second part (204) at an angle ranging from 2Â° to 180Â°. 3. The heat exchanger (100) as claimed in claim 2, wherein the first part (202) and the second part (204) are perpendicular to each other. 4. The heat exchanger (100) as claimed in any of the preceding claims, wherein the second part (204) is adapted to be connected with an external fluid circuit to enable fluid circulation in the plurality of heat exchange elements (104). 5. The heat exchanger (100) as claimed in any of the preceding claims , wherein the first part (202) is connected with the second part (204) along an axis of the first part (202). 6. The heat exchanger (100) as claimed in any of the preceding claims, wherein an end of the second part (204) is bent at angle and adapted to be fluidically connected to the first part (202) of the manifold (102A). x. 7. The heat exchanger (100) as claimed in any of the preceding claims, wherein the first part (202) is having same length as the second part (204). 8. The heat exchanger (100) as claimed in any of the preceding claims, wherein the first part (202) of the manifold (102A) comprises slots (302) adapted to receive the plurality of heat exchange elements (104). 9. The heat exchanger (100) as claimed in claim 8, wherein the plurality of heat exchange elements (104) is brazed to the first part (202) of the manifold (102A). 10. The heat exchanger (100) as claimed in any of the preceding claims, further comprising a sealing cap (304) provided at one end of the first part (202) to seal the cross-section of the first part (202) of the manifold (102A), and another end of the first part (202) being fluidically connected to the second part (204). 11. The heat exchanger (100) as claimed in any of the preceding claims, wherein the manifold (102A) is a tube having the first part (202) and the second part (204). 12. The heat exchanger (100) as claimed in claim 4, wherein an open end of the second part (204) of the manifold (102A) is connected to a connector (306) that adapted to enable connection to the external fluid circuit.
